steps.title: Find Charles's weekly savings
steps.content:
Charles saves $\frac{3}{5}$ of $225 per week. Calculate his weekly savings:

$$\text{Weekly savings} = \frac{3}{5} \times 225 = \frac{675}{5} = 135$$

Charles saves \$135 each week.

steps.title: Multiply by 3 weeks
steps.content:
To find total savings over 3 weeks, multiply the weekly amount by 3:

$$135 \times 3 = 405$$

Charles will save \$405 in 3 weeks.
